input.layout_description: A course with many Waddlewings , Super Acorns , and moving hills.
An underground course with many shifting crystal platforms and Piranha Plants . This level also contains a secret exit .
A tower course with cogs and Burners . Boom Boom is fought here at the end.
A course with fast-moving rolling hills and Yoshis. There are many Yoshi bushes about.
A sky course with many Piranha Plants.
A grassy course with flowers and hedges, one of which is Luigi-shaped, and Big Piranha Plants. Many Piranha plants cover the course.
A dark castle with Munchers and swinging platforms. Lemmy Koopa is fought here in his airship.
An underwater course in which Luigi must evade a Cheep Chomp and huge groups of Cheep Cheeps . This level unlocks a path to Soda Jungle . Full of Cheep Chomps and pipes.
A level featuring many Spikes , similarly to Spike's Spouting Sands from New Super Mario Bros. U . Many Spike's and their spike balls litter the level and pits of quicksand.
A desert cave course with many Pokeys and Grrrols .
A dark blackout cave course with moving platforms, Glowing Baby Yoshis , Fire Brothers , and Big Piranha Plants . The cave is illuminated by the fire and glowing Yoshis.
The second tower of the game. It features many sandy screws, giant sliding platforms, and many opportunities to be crushed. The boss is Boom Boom .
A desert stage featuring moving Stone-Eyes that can push Luigi. This level also contains a secret exit . There are also a few caves with fossils in the walls.
A course with Stone Spikes and moving lifts . Some giant mushrooms and platforms in the sky.
A stage with many spinning hills and Stalking Piranha Plants . There are many rolling hills with small open caves and sand geysers.
A castle with moving blocks that act as bridges to guide Luigi across the lava .
A course featuring slippery land, ladders, and many Piranha Plants . Giant ice chunks with fire spewing Piranha Plants dominate the stage, with a few ladders to dodge them.
A course with Huckit Crabs and wooden huts. There are water geysers that spray over the wooden platforms.
An underwater course with many Urchins , Big Eep Cheeps , and undertows.
This tower features many Skewers , Fire Bros., and high speed elevators.
The haunted shipwreck level in Sparkling Waters featuring Spinning Boo Buddies and Fish Bones . Takes place in a haunted shipwreck graveyard.
A level where Water Geysers and palm trees are the main footholds. Goombrats and Piranha Plants are in this stage.
A waterfall stage with Water Geysers. Stalking Piranha Plants and leaping Cheep Cheeps make an appearance in this level.
Another underwater level featuring two Dragoneels . There are also Urchins that tumble down from above.
An open castle with King Bills , Torpedo Teds , and Targeting Teds . Larry Koopa is the boss at the end of this castle. There is a large underwater segment where torpedos are fired at the player.
An auto-scrolling level in the forest where Luigi must climb many beanstalks while avoiding Lakitus , Piranha Plants , and Waddlewings . Yoshi makes an appearance in this level.
A course with Star Lifts and Broozers . Takes place in a starry night sky.
A stage where Cooligans slide on Seesaw Shroom platforms.
This tower contains platforms that move under falling icicles . There are many spiky traps above and below.
An ice level featuring Fire Brothers and Fire Piranha Plants . There are open caves with fire melting the ice all throughout the stage.
In this stage, Luigi must use several Scale Lifts to go across large gaps while avoiding Waddlewings .
Luigi can cross the whole level quickly using a Penguin Suit . Takes place in an ice cave, with giant rolling ice hills.
This Ghost House level has floating platforms and Circling Boo Buddies . This level also contains a secret exit .
The Frosted Glacier castle with Big Thwomps . Giant Thwomps crush the ground and destroy platforms.
A secret course featuring many Flipruses . Full of sharp icicles and ice platforms floating in the lake.
An airship level with various Hammer Bros . and Mechakoopas .
A stage in which Luigi swings across vines to avoid giant enemies and falling into the poison . There are giant enemies and pipes all throughout the level.
A stage in which block platforms sink and rise as well as appear and retract from the poison water. This level also contains a secret exit .
A course in a mossy jungle area with several Bramballs as obstacles.
A tower stage featuring several Grrrols rolling along regular and giant Snake Blocks to ascend the tower .
A dark Ghost House featuring several Circling Boo Buddies and rotating, swinging, and moving platforms. This level also contains a secret exit .
A painted-style level with several swinging Warp Pipes , some of which are containing Piranha Plants .
An underwater level containing moving Stone-Eyes and navigating around cave ruins.
A stage featuring several moving seesaws and Sumo Bros all over the poison water . The Sumo Bros. shock the bridges.
A vertical-scrolling level in which Luigi must bounce off of Big Wigglers to avoid the rising poison.
A castle featuring swinging chains and waves of lava . You swing along the chains to avoid the lava waves.

A course that primarily focuses on the Para-Beetles and Heavy Para-Beetles . Piranha Plants, Banzai Bills , King Bills , and several P Switches are also present. You must scale the para-beetles to scale to the skies.
A rocky cliff level with Fuzzies floating in the clouds with wooden platforms.
An underground level with low water level and a Porcupuffer . There are noteblocks and poles above the water.
A tower full of Brick Blocks destroyable only by Grrrols .
A level with red tilting platforms attacked by Spikes . Wooden cliff structure inhabited by Spikes.
An underground level with self-raising Light Blocks and some fire enemies. The fire lights up the dark.
A level full of Piranha Plants and moving platforms over the clifftop skies.
A level focused on riding Spine Coasters over poison waters in the sky.
A tower level with platform with center cogs and lots of Sumo Bros . You spin up screwtop platforms to ascend the tower.
An underground level with Spike Tops focused on ? Switches chain reactions.
A castle with moving Iron Blocks , Conveyor Belts , and lava .
In the first level of the seventh world, Luigi encounters Fuzzies and Ice Bros in the skies.
This level features multiple Munchers and Wigglers .
As its name states, this level is mainly set on halls surrounded by rainbow walls, as well as colorful wooden blocks. Luigi also encounters Bullet Bills and Waddlewings .
The last Tower in the game. Tower full of crushing platforms and girders.
The last Ghost House in the game. Luigi needs to pass platforms that disappear behind him in a spooky house full of Boos. This level also contains a secret exit .
This level features Bouncy Clouds and Boomerang Bros .
This level features multiple rotating platforms, acting as Ferris Wheels. Flame Chomps also appear here.
The Snake Blocks are the main source of footing in the stage aside from other floating platforms. Luigi must avoid Foos that appear here.

Ludwig von Koopa , the last Koopaling to be fought is here. Luigi must be careful on this level to avoid being crushed by the mechancial platforms and gears. Bony Beetles and Fire Bars appear in this castle.
Luigi must be careful to avoid the Mecha Hand on the last airship level in the game. Bowser Jr. is fought here on the giant airship full of cannons and explosives.
A level that features platforms that rise and sink in the lava, along with falling fireballs and meteors.
A level on a raft over a lava lake. Many Monty Moles and other enemies can be found that fall onto the raft, stopping it in place. Magmaws jump from the lava.
A volcano level that consists of moving cogs, along with Lava Bubbles.
A volcano level with blocks constantly appearing and disappearing and meteors .
A level inside Princess Peach's Castle with rising lava. You dodge stunners on a platform being lifted up, that stops when enemies land on it.
This is the last level where Luigi can find Spine Coasters . It is set in a place similar to Acorn Plains . The main enemies in this level are Fuzzies .
This level has a Layer-Cake Desert setting, where Luigi must hit P Switches in order to progress. Luigi needs to run under falling Iron Blocks while avoiding Spinies and Waddlewings .
Taking place in a haunted shipwreck, Luigi is persistently trying to not be eaten by a Cheep Chomp , who is also useful to defeat enemies.
Taking place in a tower , this level features swinging hammer-like platforms that can help Luigi to climb to the top. Flipruses are also found here.
This level takes place in a level with an identical art style of Painted Pipeworks . This stage contains poison that can be avoided by Brick Blocks which are used as platforms for the level.
Luigi must deal with many Huge Fire Bars in this Rock-Candy Mines -like level. The more Luigi advances in this level, the faster the Huge Fire Bars spin.
In this stage, Luigi must ride Lakitu's Cloud in between many Fuzzies , switching clouds at different points.
A stage where Luigi must dodge many giant spinners . The background is the same as The Final Battle Castle. Giant spikey ball and chains dominate the stage.

The last level of the game. Luigi must use the Flying Squirrel Suit to finish this snow-themed level where many Waddlewings appear. This is the only level of the game where Nabbit is not playable in the single-player mode of the original Wii U version, and the only level where the player can play as a Mii .
